articles.title: GitLab Duo Security Review spots logic flaws scanners miss
articles.excerpt: Static scanners excel at catching vulnerabilities that fit a known pattern, like unsanitized query inputs, hardcoded secrets, and unsafe deserialization. They struggle against flaws in your application’s logic, where there is no pattern to match — only valid code doing the wrong thing for your domain.
